mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM fin_receipt
AND receipt_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{receiptNo}, '%')
AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM fin_receipt WHERE TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fin_receipt WHERE receipt_no LIKE CONCAT(#{dateStr}, '%')
